component.name: DebForge SCX
component.summary: Qt6 GUI for managing sched-ext BPF CPU schedulers

description.p: DebForge SCX provides everything needed to install and manage sched-ext BPF schedulers on Debian 13+ (Trixie).
The installer handles the full build-from-source pipeline: build dependencies, Rust bootstrap, building scx schedulers and scx-loader/scxctl, systemd service, D-Bus, and PolKit configuration.
Once installed, the GUI lets you start, stop, and switch schedulers with one click, view live status with auto-refresh, enable boot persistence, and browse a reference of all available schedulers.
